narrative:
Washington 2A (precinct in Fayette County) has 430 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.6 percentage points.
